minor_compatible_changes: relax a numeric or length bound without changing meaning
major_breaking_changes: change a property type or semantic meaning
change a fingerprint input, canonicalisation rule, or stable identifier rule

reader_policy.unknown_optional_properties: ignore after validating the known major version
reader_policy.unknown_vocabulary_values: reject unless that field explicitly declares an open vocabulary

writer_policy.secrets: values and token-bearing URLs are prohibited
